claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: An accessibility-hidden, dimension-preserving loading placeholder with text, rectangle, and circle shapes.
semantics: Skeleton is always aria-hidden and rejects accessible-name, live-region, role, and child-content overrides at typed and runtime boundaries.
Logical block and inline dimensions reserve the future content footprint and numeric sizes normalize to CSS pixels.
Pulse animation disappears under reduced motion and forced colors preserves a visible boundary.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: Animation is removed while static text, shape, native state, and reserved layout remain authoritative.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
